g.title: phase1_components
g.text: Workers hold no store credentials (mounted fd in, UDS out; orchestrator brokers writes). Detonation is a separate host. The pump is two processes.

g.title: cluster_data
g.text: , single-use, empty netns, seccomp, NO store creds

g.title: cluster_det
g.text: , SEPARATE host, no route/creds to control (diagram 03)
